case_title: JONATHAN FARBER et al VS. STEVEN MILLER

docket_entries.description: POS OF PETITION TO CONFIRM, CORRECT OR VACATE CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER FARBER, JONATHAN SWANSON, JOLYN

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONERS JONATHAN FARBER AND JOLYN SWANSON'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, ENTER JUDGMENT AND FOR POST-AWARD COSTS AND FEES IS GRANTED.
